description: Open Data Network is a public data discovery and question-answering site built on Socrata open data. It aggregates and presents government and nonprofit datasets, including comparative geographic and narrative-style data views.
summary: OpenDataNetwork exposes one documented HTTP REST API: the ODN API at `http://api.opendatanetwork.com`, authenticated with a Socrata application token passed in `X-App-Token` or `app_token`.
